channel.title: GitHub AutoIt Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of AutoIt in GitHub

item.title: SegoCode/AutoWall
item.description: 🌌 Live wallpapers on Windows 7/8/10/11 using open-source wallpaper engine

item.title: rcmaehl/WhyNotWin11
item.description: Detection Script to help identify why your PC is not Windows 11 Release Ready. Now Supporting Update Checks!

item.title: KovaaK/InterAccel
item.description: QuakeLive style mouse acceleration across your entire OS and any game

item.title: Bioruebe/UniExtract2
item.description: Universal Extractor 2 is a tool to extract files from any type of archive or installer.

item.title: rcmaehl/MSEdgeRedirect
item.description: A Tool to Redirect News, Search, Widgets, Weather and More to Your Default Browser
